description.en: A large, terrestrial bird of prey famous for hunting snakes by stomping them to death with incredibly fast and powerful kicks.
description.zh: 一种大型陆生猛禽，以惊人快速和有力的踢击将蛇踩死而闻名。

anatomy.en: The secretary bird stands up to 1.3 meters (4 ft 3 in) tall, resembling an eagle with the long legs of a crane. It gets its name from the distinctive black crest feathers on its head, which look like the quill pens historically tucked behind the ears of clerks. Its lower legs are covered in thick scales to protect against snake bites.
anatomy.zh: 秘书鸟站立时高达1.3米（4英尺3英寸），外表像长着鹤一样长腿的鹰。它的名字来源于它头上独特的黑色羽冠，看起来就像历史上文员夹在耳朵后面的羽毛笔。它的下肢覆盖着厚厚的鳞片，以抵御蛇的咬伤。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Unlike most birds of prey that swoop from the sky, the secretary bird hunts mainly on foot. It striding through the savanna, searching for insects, rodents, and venomous snakes. When encountering a snake, it delivers rapid, powerful stomps capable of generating a force up to five times its own body weight in just 15 milliseconds—too fast for a snake to strike back.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 不同于大多数从天而降的猛禽，秘书鸟主要在地面上步猎。它在大草原上大步流星，寻找昆虫、啮齿动物和毒蛇。当遇到蛇时，它会进行快速、有力的连续踩踏，能在短短15毫秒内产生高达自身体重5倍的力量，让蛇根本来不及反击。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Endemic to Africa, they inhabit the open grasslands and savannas of the sub-Saharan region. They avoid dense forests and extreme deserts, preferring areas where the grass is relatively short so they can easily spot prey and run. They build huge, flat nests made of sticks in the crowns of Acacia trees.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 作为非洲的特有种，它们栖息在撒哈拉以南地区的开阔草原和稀树大草原上。它们避开茂密的森林和极端的沙漠，更喜欢草相对较短的区域，这样它们就可以很容易地发现猎物并奔跑。它们在金合欢树的树冠上用树枝建造巨大且平坦的巢穴。

habitat.text_zh: 开阔的稀树大草原与草地
